history.subject: N14: residue-field embedding ι completes local-step ≤ deg P; order surjectivity + N15 one-step χ-bound χ(D+P) ≤ χ(D)+deg P

Register ChartSectionsFinite (Serre D1: sections of a coherent module over an affine chart are a finite module; plus the qcqs global-section localization engine and the structure-sheaf special cases of the twisted extension/vanishing D2/D3, and the projective-over-field qcqs substrate).
Serre D1: finite sections on affine/projective charts (Stacks 01PC) and the qcqs extension–vanishing engine on a projective total space.

Sync RiemannRoch_Adelic + Picard blueprint chapters to wave-6/7 Lean deliverables: flip N5 (cechCohomologyOneEquivH1Cok) to unconditional \leanok with N6 gated corollary and N12 GenusFiniteness consumable; record N9/N9a finite-map-to-P1 derivation and the N9a->ExistsNonconstantMapToProjInt bridge; land the P1 chart-ring nodes (p1CoordAway, span_p1CoordAway_pow_top, P1HasLaurentChartData gate); land ChiLedger N13-N16 (coboundary/window map, local-step residue-degree bound, chi-additivity, Riemann inequality) with honest gates on the undelivered Mittag-Leffler surjectivity, residue-field identification, and telescoping steps; add the missing sectionOfDivisor_antitone_open node feeding the N13 overlap lemma. Record the data-carrying HasAbelMap/abelMap repin (Div_{C/k} -> Pic^sharp, defining property abelMap_app_mk) as the natural-transformation half only (no Div representability claim). Record the P0.5 IsLocallyTrivial -> IsInvertibleGr bridge (unlocking graded-commutativity for the Serre twist family) and the D5 finite-generation -> finite-dimensional-graded-pieces theorem. Register the four new RiemannRoch/Adelic leaf files in the chapter's archon:covers header.

Twist support monotonicity: Ann F ≤ Ann(F⊗G) at the ideal-sheaf level (annihilator sections kill the sheafified tensor via local surjectivity of the sheafification unit + presheaf-tensor annihilator monotonicity + sheaf separatedness), hence proper support transfers to all twists F⊗L^m — step (3) of the gammaFiber reduction

Γ-fibre flat base change over a field via schematic-support descent: for qcoh G on Xt/K with proper support, dim_{K'} Γ(b^*G) = dim_K Γ(G) — assembled from G ≅ i_*i^*G, the 02KH exchange b^*(i_*N) ≅ j_*(w^*N) on the closed-immersion square, the CLOSED 02KE heart at ⊤ on the pasted proper-support square, and finrank transport along ΓSpecIso (rank_eq_of_equiv_equiv + IsField transfer)

gammaFiber reduced to one leaf: PROVED gammaFiber_finrank_baseChange_field_of_quasicoherent (fibre properness transfer + twist-support monotonicity + Γ-fibre 02KH core on the fibre square, all defeq through fiberSectionsModule/ΓSpecIso); the named sorry now carries ONLY quasi-coherence of the sheafified twist F_t⊗L_t^m (Stacks 01CB affine tensor-section formula, the TensorSectionFormula wiring pass)

Nonconstant map to Proj Z[X0,X1] exists for every AJC curve: gate N9a discharged. A rational function 1/pi with a pole (chart height lower bound gives a non-generic point) is regular on an open locus L(t) carrying a canonical glued section; L(t) and L(1/t) cover C by the valuative dichotomy, which descends along the faithfully flat stalk map from the DVR stalks of C x_k kbar (localRing_dvr_of_codim_one over the algebraic closure + Ideal.comap_map_eq_self_of_faithfullyFlat), removing the perfect-field restriction; the two chart morphisms X0->1,X1->t and X0->1/t,X1->1 agree on the overlap through D+(X0X1) by the homogeneous swap identity and glue to C -> Proj Z[X0,X1], separating the generic point (in D+(X0)) from the pole (not in it). HasFiniteMapToP1 is now unconditional for AJC curves; axioms clean.
ℙ¹ chart ring: Γ(V₀) is k-spanned by powers of x=X₁/X₀ (char-free base change)
docs: record ℙ¹ chart route step 2 (Γ(V₀)=k[x]) as landed; note remaining y-chart/overlap/assembly and the RingHom.comp X-index elaboration pitfall
